name: debtor_name_present
expression: debtor_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(debtor_name)) > 0
description: Security agreement must identify the debtor or grantor.

name: secured_party_present
expression: secured_party_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(secured_party_name)) > 0
description: Secured party should be captured for collateral controls.

name: collateral_description_present
expression: collateral_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(collateral_description)) > 0
description: Collateral description is required to use a security agreement extraction.

name: collateral_categories_array_valid
description: Collateral categories should be represented as an array.

name: perfection_requirements_array_valid
description: Perfection requirements should be represented as an array.
